name: Hunting Bundy: Chase for the Devil
original_name: Hunting Bundy: Chase for the Devil
overview: The untold story of the multi-state manhunt to capture serial killer Ted Bundy. The series focuses on the relentless investigation by detectives from multiple states, using newly uncovered crime scene photos and dramatic police interview tapes to highlight the crucial work that brought Bundy to justice.

trailers.title: Hunting Bundy: Chase for the Devil Official Trailer | Fox Nation
